question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/main.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_INTERVAL to a near-zero duration (e.g., '1ns') via environment variable injection, causing the time.NewTicker(cfg.interval) to fire at maximum rate and flood the Hedera network with transfer transactions, degrading service availability for all other users without any economic loss?
